form.formComment: Resuming after three months. Finished off last preparation 3 of 8 starters at Wincanton January 15 over 5000m, slow track; 15 len behind Major Fortune carrying 71.5kg at $11. When resuming last campaign 3 of 9 runners at Uttoxeter October 31 over 4000m, 13 len behind Home Made Hero with 73kg at $3.30. Sure to be tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Resuming after three months. Finished off last preparation 3 of 8 starters at Wincanton January 15 over 5000m, slow track; 15 len behind Major Fortune carrying 71.5kg at $11. When resuming last campaign 3 of 9 runners at Uttoxeter October 31 over 4000m, 13 len behind Home Made Hero with 73kg at $3.30. Sure to be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after seven months finished eighth of 10 runners at Wincanton on March 23 over 4900m, 19 len behind Our Dylan carrying 73.5kg at $15. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; finished third in a small field at Warwick on June 4 over 5200m, 36 len behind Saint Bibiana with 74kg at $21. Will strip fitter but needs to go up a notch.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Having second run back today. First-up after seven months finished eighth of 10 runners at Wincanton on March 23 over 4900m, 19 len behind Our Dylan carrying 73.5kg at $15. Will strip fitter but needs to go up a notch.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after two months finished second in a small field at Huntingdon on April 4 over 4700m, 22 len behind Overabottleofred with 69.5kg at $10. Previously second-up made some head-way from midfield; finished third of 7 starters at this track on December 20 over 5000m, 12 len behind Buckna with 69kg at $10. Fitter for run. Capable of going one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stewards Advice: Post Race: Veterinary Advice: Lost its left fore shoe.
